message:
fix: validate marker count and order in detectHookMarkerState (bd-d96s)

Replace strings.Contains with strings.Count to detect duplicate BEGIN/END
markers and verify BEGIN precedes END. Previously, corrupted hook files
with duplicate marker blocks were incorrectly reported as valid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
